pageContext.name: Rachel Green 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Next in the Chibi® coin series features the beloved fashionista, Rachel Green™, from the iconic TV series, FRIENDS™  This wonderful piece displays Rachel wearing her iconic Central Perk waitress uniform and with a cup of coffee in her hand. Made from 1oz pure silver, the coin is shaped and colored to resemble the character as Chibi art. The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, confirming it is legal tender.   Officially licensed in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin arrives in a FRIENDS™ branded case and includes a large window, ideal for display. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed at the back of the box alongside the coin's unique serial number in the mintage of just 2,000.   This piece is sure to be popular, so make sure to grab yours today!
